COMPONENT COMPOSITION PATTERNS - **SolidJS primitives used**: `C` (createSignal), `me` (createEffect for batched style updates), `de` (createEffect for reactive side effects), `ue` (createComponent), `_` (insert), `ie` (setStyle), `le` (setAttribute), `Y` (template), `ft` (createMemo), `kn` (For), `vs` (Show/when), `Xt` (onMount), `ce` (onCleanup), `we` (ref callback), `Ji` (style object spread), `ji` (delegateEvents), `vn` (addEventListener with delegation) - **Canvas nine-slice rendering**: Functions `We`, `Rt`, `Qs`, `Qs` all implement the same pattern -- load a BLP texture atlas (8 patches: 4 corners + 4 edges in a horizontal strip), draw them onto a canvas with corner pieces at fixed size and stretched/tiled edges - **3D model loading pattern**: fetch MDX -> parse with `Hn` -> create `no` (ModelRenderer) -> `initGL` -> load BLP textures -> `setTextureImageData` -> animate with `requestAnimationFrame` - **BLP texture pipeline**: fetch -> `rn` (decode BLP header) -> `nn` (decode mip level) -> create ImageData -> draw to canvas -> `toDataURL("image/png")` for use as CSS/img src - **Async asset caching**: All loaders use `Map` caches (`Is`, `Gs`, `Ns`, `Zs`, `js`, `ca`, `ua`, `Oa`, `Ha`, `za`, `Xa`, `Wa`, `sa`, `qs`, `Ys`, `ha`, `na`) --- ## 4.
